item.title: META To Cut 8,000 Workers To Offset Heavy AI Spending: Report
item.description: Meta will lay off 10% of its workforce to offset the heavy spending it intends to make for AI advancements.

item.title: SKLZ Stock Soars To Its Highest In 33 Months After Winning A $420M Lawsuit
item.description: SKLZ wins court case against Israel-based rival Papaya Gaming.

item.title: JPMorgan Had A Chat With Robinhood Management Ahead Of Earnings Next Week — Why Did It Lower Its Target Valuation Multiple?
item.description: For the first quarter, analysts estimate Robinhood’s revenue at $1.14 billion and earnings per share at $0.39, according to Fiscal AI.

item.title: Regeneron's Gene Therapy For Genetic Hearing Loss Gets Accelerated FDA Nod — Drug Pricing Deal With White House To Be Announced Today
item.description: Regeneron is only one of the 17 pharmaceutical companies that have not yet agreed to lower U.S. drug prices following letters sent by the Trump admini...

item.title: LMT Stock On Track To Register Eighth Consecutive Session Of Losses – Lockheed Remains Confident About Meeting 2026 Guidance
item.description: Lockheed Martin said the government’s focus on defense industrial base investment and modernization spending has created a favorable environment for t...
